title: Ţāqah Heavy Rain
lead: Ţāqah experiences heavy rain with a Z-Score of +3.23. This event is classified as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain in Ţāqah is expected to continue, with high humidity levels at 87%. 
 The current wind speed is 4.9 km/h, which may lead to further disruptions. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, while the CDD is 10.3 GG, indicating significant temperature deviations.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
